name: Zhongtai Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhongtai Securities Co., Ltd. operates as a securities brokerage company in China. It provides financial advisory, securities issuance and underwriting, mergers and acquisitions, asset restructuring, asset management, margin financing, securities lending, and investment consulting services, as well as acts as an agent for securities trading, financial products, and securities investment fund. The company is also involved in the credit, investment banking, wealth management, counter market, institutional sales transaction, self-operated, and research consulting businesses, as well as offers risk management; compliance management; and hosting, outsourcing, and institutional brokerage services. In addition, it operates Zhongtai Qifutong, a mobile Internet integrated service portal platform for Zhongtai securities. The company was formerly known as Qilu Securities Co., Ltd. Zhongtai Securities Co., Ltd. is based in Jinan, China.
